Usage: heyfood household [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Manage the local household roster and active agent scope.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                                                          │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ list     List household members and the active conversational scope.                                                 │
│ current  Show the locally active conversational household scope.                                                     │
│ use      Persist the default household scope for ask, reply, chat, and log.                                          │
│ label    Give an imported profile id a local name and relationship.                                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
